name: justokenmax
install_doc:
pip install justokenmax
# Hook into Claude Code:
justokenmax install
# MCP proxy usage:
justokenmax proxy -- npx -y some-mcp-server
notes: Python toolkit. Multi-surface: (1) Claude Code hooks (PreToolUse/Stop) for attachment optimization at read time; (2) MCP stdio proxy that compresses tools/call results and trims tools/list descriptions from any downstream MCP server. Cache-safe: compresses tool OUTPUT and file attachments, never rewrites history. Key compressors: lockfile→name@version table (npm/yarn/pnpm/poetry/cargo/gemfile), minified-asset stub, diff compression (elides lockfile/generated/dist sections), log compression (ANSI strip + volatile-prefix dedup + signature-based grouping of repeated errors + stack-frame folding), code outline (per-language symbol extraction), delta reads (unified diff on re-read instead of full file), image downscaling (Pillow), PDF→Markdown (pypdf). Skills: cache-align (prompt-prefix stability discipline), terse-output (output token reduction guide), code-index, chat-branch, attachments. discover command surveys Claude Code history (~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl) for recoverable tokens and unsupported-ext backlog.
